summary: The /about page remains a bare placeholder ("This is an about page" on a near-blank dark canvas with no nav or footer), and the homepage LCP has crept up to 7.8 s (performance 66, down from 70) — both are ongoing issues. All three /projects routes continue to render correctly.

pages.visual_fingerprint: Full-page portfolio homepage with a teal-accented hero ('App' heading, 'Send me a message' CTA), four content sections (pillars, case studies, skills, contact form), and a dark teal footer — all sections visible and correctly laid out on both desktop and mobile.

visual_findings: Page contains only the placeholder text 'This is an about page' on an otherwise near-blank dark canvas — no real content, nav, or footer present on either desktop or mobile.
pages.visual_fingerprint: Nearly blank dark page with only the stub text 'This is an about page' in the upper-left corner and no other UI elements visible on desktop or mobile.

Fully styled projects index page with 'My Projects' heading, four project cards (Clinical Note Structurer, Screenshot → PrimeVue, Lease Diff Explainer, Paperwork → Calendar) in a 2-column desktop grid, and a dark contact footer — all content visible and correctly laid out on both desktop and mobile.

Clinical Note Structurer detail page with breadcrumb nav, 'Evals: 9/10 passing' badge, a two-column visit note / structured result interactive demo, disclaimer banner, expandable JSON and HIPAA notes accordions, and a dark contact footer — correctly rendered on both desktop and mobile.

Screenshot → PrimeVue detail page with breadcrumb nav, 'Evals: 5/5 passing' badge, a dashed-border image drop zone, three sample thumbnail cards (Login form, Analytics dashboard, Pricing page), a placeholder result panel, expandable accordions, and a dark contact footer — correctly rendered on both desktop and mobile.

score_deltas: / performance 70 → 66 (drop of 4 pts — within jitter range but LCP worsened to 7788 ms from 7304 ms; remains well below 85 threshold — chronic issue)
/ lcp_ms 7304 → 7788 (marginal regression, chronic slow LCP continues to worsen slightly)
/about performance 82 → 84 (+2 pts, within jitter; LCP improved 3813 ms → 3514 ms; page remains a placeholder)
top_fix: Fix the homepage LCP (currently 7.8 s, performance 66, worsening day-over-day): identify and preload or optimize the hero image and eliminate any render-blocking resources — this is the single highest-impact improvement on the site.
issue_title: /about page is still an empty placeholder — no real content
issue_body:
## /about is an unfinished placeholder

Both desktop and mobile screenshots show only the stub text **"This is an about page"** on a near-blank dark canvas — no navigation, biography, photo, skills summary, or footer is rendered.

This has now persisted across at least three consecutive audits (2026-07-03, 2026-07-04, and 2026-07-05).

### Impact
- Any visitor or recruiter who navigates to `/about` sees an empty page with no information.
- The page SEO score (83) remains below the 85 threshold.

### Steps to reproduce
1. Visit https://dliamkin.com/about on desktop or mobile.
2. Observe that only the placeholder text is rendered with no other UI.

### Suggested fix
Replace the stub with real about-page content (bio, photo, skills summary, links) using the same layout shell as the rest of the site, including nav and contact footer.
